description: F56 create+delete safe sender lifecycle (Sprint 41 F97, authored 2026-06-13). Creates an Entire-Domain safe sender for 'winwright-test.com' (a non-existent domain chosen to avoid duplicate-check collision with production safe senders), confirms the save dialog, then uses the Manage Safe Senders search box to locate and delete the created pattern in a teardown testCase -- net DB change is zero. Accepted domain input format confirmed from DomainValidation.validateDomain (domain_validation.dart:21-63): bare domain with at least one dot and a TLD in kIanaTlds (e.g. 'winwright-test.com'). Domain must not start or end with a dot, must not contain consecutive dots, all labels must match [a-z0-9-]+, and the TLD must be in kIanaTlds Set. Generated pattern: @(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*winwright-test\.com$ , source_domain: winwright-test.com. The Entire Domain type is the default selection on the create screen (ManualRuleCreateScreen initState sets _selectedType = ManualRuleType.entireDomain). TLD type is not available for safe senders (only Entire Domain, Exact Domain, Exact Email). Selectors verified against selector map _SELECTOR_MAP_2026-06-05.md. STATUS: authored, pending sweep verification.

testCases.title: Create Entire Domain safe sender for winwright-test.com
Delete the winwright-test.com safe sender (teardown -- restores DB state)
